message:
Add tuple unpacking, test analysis, and list comprehensions

Agent 1 - Tuple unpacking:
- Implemented a, b = (1, 2) pattern
- Generates __unpack_tmp intermediate variable
- Accesses tuple fields via @"0", @"1" syntax
- Fixed parser bug: advance() is not error union

Agent 2 - Test failure analysis (diagnostic only):
- Categorized 51 failures into 6 categories
- Identified 13 missing features (exceptions, imports, async)
- Found 10 type system issues (dict, inheritance)
- Documented 11 quick wins remaining
- Implemented var mutability fix (semantic analysis)

Agent 3 - List comprehensions:
- Implemented [x * 2 for x in range(5)]
- Support for filters: [x for x in range(10) if x % 2 == 0]
- Multiple generators: [x*y for x in range(3) for y in range(3)]
- Generates ArrayList with toOwnedSlice
- Fixed % operator in operators.zig

Known issues:
- List comprehensions have memory leaks (toOwnedSlice allocations)
- Lists still print as {0,2,4} not [0,2,4] in comprehensions

Test results: 38/89 passing (43% - no change, features work but have issues)
